title: aster baylahuen
side_effects: Aster baylahuen can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. In severe cases, improper use of Aster baylahuen can result in seizures, coma, or even death, particularly in individuals with pre-existing health conditions. Furthermore, improper preparation of the plant can also cause allergic reactions, skin irritation, and other adverse effects.
